pi_items.source:
Code analysis of setup_task.sh confirms the python script injects a new requirement with the exact text '

The application shall enforce a minimum password length of 12 characters for all user accounts.

' into SRS.json.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh verifies the dynamically injected requirement explicitly sets the key 'status' to 'Draft'.
Code analysis of verifier.py confirms it evaluates the task successfully if the actual status of the target requirement is changed to 'Ready'.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh and verifier.py which exclusively manipulate and verify changes within the 'documents/SRS.json' file.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically injected data within a ReqView example project. During setup, a specific requirement containing the text 'minimum password length' is injected into the SRS.json document with its initial status set to 'Draft'. The task successfully completes when the agent locates this requirement in the SRS document and changes its status to 'Ready', which is directly validated by parsing the modified JSON file.
